assertion_results.text: The response describes locating the digest comment using the marker string '[sdlc-workflow] Description digest:' from shared/description-digest-protocol.md
assertion_results.evidence: digest-match.md, lines 26-29: 'Search through the returned comments for any whose body starts with the marker string defined in `shared/description-digest-protocol.md`: `[sdlc-workflow] Description digest:`'. Also in plan.md, line 65: 'Locate the comment with marker `[sdlc-workflow] Description digest:`'

assertion_results.text: The response describes computing a SHA-256 hash of the current description and comparing it with the stored digest
assertion_results.evidence: digest-match.md, lines 65-91: Section 5 'Compute the Current Digest' describes computing SHA-256 of the current description field text, and Section 6 'Compare Digests' describes comparing 'the stored digest (from the comment) with the computed digest (from the current description)'. plan.md line 67 also states: 'Compute SHA-256 of the current description using `scripts/sha256-digest.py`'

assertion_results.text: The response confirms the digests match and states it will proceed silently without prompting the user — no additional latency for the happy path
assertion_results.evidence: digest-match.md, lines 97-110: Section 7 'Outcome: Match -- Proceed Silently' explicitly states: 'No user prompt -- the user is not asked to confirm or approve anything', 'No warning message -- no output is generated about the digest check', 'No additional latency -- the happy path adds only the time to fetch comments and compute the hash, with no user interaction delay'. plan.md line 68: 'Compare digests: **MATCH** -- proceed silently, no user prompt, no delay'

assertion_results.text: The response does not alert the user or pause execution due to the digest check — it proceeds directly to subsequent steps
assertion_results.evidence: digest-match.md, lines 97-110: explicitly states 'No pause in execution -- the skill moves directly to subsequent steps without stopping'. plan.md shows the plan proceeding from Step 1.5 directly to Step 2 (Verify Dependencies) with no user interaction indicated for the digest check.
